subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-10-07
subcodes.first_line: Astaghfuru'llah! I desire for them everlasting glory. I educated this youth (Dr. Faríd) so that he would be of benefit to the Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: استغفر الله من از برای آنها عزت ابدیه خواستم این پسر را دکتر فرید را تربیت نمودم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
